logs.message: AIAugmentedPitchAnalyzer.Infrastructure depends on System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt (>= 6.31.1) but System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt 6.31.1 was not found. An approximate best match of System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt 6.32.0 was resolved.
Package 'System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt' 6.32.0 has a known moderate severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-59j7-ghrg-fj52
